name: Milestone
description:
What Milestone Does?

Milestone provides ‘Discovery’ services for Local business to help them increase their online visibility, reach new customers and build an online local presence. 

Source: Milestone

Features:

➡️ Offers custom website development services tailored to clients' needs.

➡️ Provides comprehensive digital marketing strategies including SEO, PPC, and social media marketing.

➡️ Implements and customizes CMS platforms like WordPress and Drupal for easy content management.

➡️ Optimizes local search visibility to attract customers in specific geographic areas.

➡️ Ensures websites are optimized for mobile devices for better user experience.

➡️ Develops and integrates e-commerce platforms for online retail businesses.

➡️ Tracks website performance and provides detailed analytics for informed decision-making.

➡️ Manages online reputation by monitoring and responding to reviews and feedback.

➡️ Improves website conversion rates through strategic design and optimization.

➡️ Ensures websites meet accessibility standards for inclusivity and compliance.

Benefits

⭐️ Tailors services to meet the unique needs and goals of each client.

⭐️ Improves online presence and search engine rankings through effective digital marketing strategies.

⭐️ Provides mobile-responsive designs and user-friendly interfaces for better engagement.

⭐️ Optimizes websites for improved conversion rates and better ROI.

⭐️ Drives targeted traffic to websites through SEO, PPC, and social media marketing efforts.

⭐️ Manages online reviews and feedback to maintain a positive brand image.

⭐️ Uses analytics and reporting to measure performance and make informed decisions.

⭐️ Offers scalable solutions to accommodate business growth and changing needs.

⭐️ Ensures websites meet accessibility standards and regulatory requirements.

⭐️ Provides ongoing support and maintenance to ensure websites perform optimally.

Pros: 

✅Keywords analysis and comparison for local competitors 

✅Provides in-depth competitor data analysis

✅Helps streamline your engagement workflows for Google Posts, Reviews, Business Messaging, and Google Business Profile Q&As across all locations

Cons: 

❌Does not have a citation builder

❌Limited features for Local SEO optimization

‍

Pricing not transparent
